# Sudoku Puzzles

EnvPool packages the official Jumanji Sudoku puzzle databases for native
`Sudoku-v0` and `Sudoku-very-easy-v0` reset sampling.

- Upstream project: https://github.com/instadeepai/jumanji
- Pinned upstream commit: `b668afc08a14a71d7eed3f618456d5bda2eea06e`
- Upstream files:
  - `jumanji/environments/logic/sudoku/data/10000_mixed_puzzles.npy`
  - `jumanji/environments/logic/sudoku/data/1000_very_easy_puzzles.npy`
- Packaged files:
  - `envpool/jumanji/assets/sudoku/10000_mixed_puzzles.npy`
    SHA256: `15f286d3c9ecaf45f1865b9eed6f8ace7d8fede6677f24bf23f818b8455c51aa`
  - `envpool/jumanji/assets/sudoku/1000_very_easy_puzzles.npy`
    SHA256: `64d9607d056cf18d543d79db3a8bf24606280251e5b16b8916f3915ba619c269`
